AbbSalesInvoice.IsAbbInvoice: Indicates whether the invoice is an abbreviated/simplified invoice format (used for quick billing or compliance scenarios).
AbbSalesInvoice.VoucherDate: The date of the invoice. Determines accounting period and affects financial reporting.
AbbSalesInvoice.ManualVoucherNO: User-defined invoice number. If empty, system may auto-generate. Should be unique.
AbbSalesInvoice.VoucherId: Unique identifier of the invoice. If provided → update; if not → create new.
AbbSalesInvoice.RefNo: Reference number (e.g., coupon no, external system reference, order ID). Used for tracking.
AbbSalesInvoice.Narration: Additional description or remarks for the invoice. Appears in reports and print formats.
AbbSalesInvoice.PartyLedgerId: Customer ledger ID. Represents the debtor account in accounting (Accounts Receivable).
AbbSalesInvoice.TotalAmount: Total invoice amount. Must match sum of all item amounts (after discount).
AbbSalesInvoice.ProductId: Unique identifier of the product/item being sold. Must exist in product master.
AbbSalesInvoice.LedgerId: Sales ledger/account where revenue will be posted (e.g., Sales Account).
AbbSalesInvoice.UnitId: Unit of measurement (e.g., PCS, KG). Must match product configuration.
AbbSalesInvoice.ActualQty: Actual quantity of goods. Used for stock tracking.
AbbSalesInvoice.BilledQty: Quantity billed to customer. May differ from actual (e.g., partial billing).
AbbSalesInvoice.FreeQty: Free quantity given (e.g., promotional items). Does not affect billing amount.
AbbSalesInvoice.Rate: Price per unit of the product.
AbbSalesInvoice.DiscountPer: Discount percentage applied on item level.
AbbSalesInvoice.DiscountAmt: Discount amount applied on item level.
AbbSalesInvoice.Amount: Final line amount after applying quantity, rate, and discount.
AbbSalesInvoice.Address: Customer address for billing and legal compliance.
AbbSalesInvoice.SalesTaxNo: Customer VAT/PAN number. Required for tax compliance.
AbbSalesInvoice.Goods: Additional logistics info (e.g., vehicle number, delivery details).

SaveDebtorRoute.Name: The official name of the debtor route. Typically represents a geographic area, locality, or route (e.g., Baneshwor, Lalitpur). Used for identifying and grouping customers.
SaveDebtorRoute.Alias: An alternate or short name for the route. Useful for internal reference, quick search, or display in UI where shorter names are preferred.
SaveDebtorRoute.Code: A unique code assigned to the route. Used as an identifier for system integration, reporting, and quick lookup. Should be unique across all routes.

SaveDebtorType.Name: The official name of the debtor type (e.g., Wholesaler, Retailer). Used for classification and reporting.
SaveDebtorType.Alias: An alternate or short name for the debtor type. Useful for internal reference, grouping, or UI display.
SaveDebtorType.Code: A unique identifier for the debtor type. Used in system integration, reporting, and quick lookup.
SaveDebtorType.DType:
Defines the category of debtor based on business classification. Allowed values:
1 = Dealer / Distributor (used for wholesale or distribution partners)
2 = Outlet (used for retail shops or end-point sellers)
3 = Branch (used for internal company branches or offices)
4 = Other (used for miscellaneous or uncategorized entities)
5 = Members (used for member-based customers, loyalty users, or special groups).

SaveAgent.Name: Full name of the agent/salesperson. Used for identification, reporting, and operational tracking.
SaveAgent.Address: Residential or operational address of the agent. Useful for regional assignment and communication.
SaveAgent.Mobile: Contact number of the agent. Used for communication, login verification, and notifications.
SaveAgent.Code: Unique identifier for the agent. Used in system mapping, reporting, and integration.
SaveAgent.Level: Defines the organizational hierarchy or role of the agent within the sales structure. Allowed values: 1 = Dealer Incharge (handles dealer-level operations) 2 = Sales Officer (executes field sales activities) 3 = ASM (Area Sales Manager) (manages a region/team) 4 = RSM (Regional Sales Manager) (oversees multiple areas) 5 = NSM (National Sales Manager) (manages national-level sales) 6 = Sales Director (strategic sales leadership) 7 = Managing Director (top-level executive authority).
SaveAgent.Designation: Official job title of the agent (e.g., Sales Officer, ASM). Used for display and organizational clarity.

SaveLedger.Name: Official name of the ledger/account (e.g., customer, supplier, bank). Used in all financial transactions and reports.
SaveLedger.Alias: Alternate or short name for the ledger. Useful for quick search and internal reference.
SaveLedger.Code: Unique identifier for the ledger. Used for system mapping, integrations, and reporting.
SaveLedger.LedgerGroupId: (Group) ID defining the classification of the ledger (e.g., Assets, Liabilities, Debtors). LedgerGroupId = 12 (Sundry Debtors), LedgerGroupId = 26 (Sundry Creditors)
SaveLedger.Address: Full address of the ledger entity. Required for billing, compliance, and reporting.
SaveLedger.IsImportExportLedger: Indicates whether the ledger is used for import/export transactions. Affects compliance and reporting rules.
SaveLedger.DrCr: Defines the default balance nature of the ledger. 1 = Debit (Dr) 2 = Credit (Cr)
SaveLedger.CurrencyName: Currency associated with the ledger (e.g., INR, NPR, USD). Used for multi-currency transactions.
SaveLedger.Status: Indicates whether the ledger is active. true = Active false = Inactive
SaveLedger.StatutoryDetail.PanVatNo: PAN/VAT/Tax identification number of the ledger. Required for statutory compliance and tax reporting.
SaveLedger.File1: Supporting document (e.g., agreement, KYC, contract). Stored against the ledger for verification and compliance.

SaveJournal.VoucherDate: The date of the journal entry. Determines the accounting period and affects financial reporting.
SaveJournal.ManualVoucherNO: User-defined journal number. If not provided, system may auto-generate. Should be unique.
SaveJournal.VoucherId: Unique identifier of the journal entry. If provided → update; if not → create new entry.
SaveJournal.RefNo: Reference number (e.g., invoice number, external document). Used for traceability.
SaveJournal.Narration: Description of the journal entry explaining the purpose of the transaction. Appears in reports.
SaveJournal.DRCR: Indicates whether the line is Debit or Credit. 1 = Debit (Dr) 2 = Credit (Cr)
SaveJournal.LedgerId: Ledger/account ID where the transaction is posted. Must exist in Chart of Accounts.
SaveJournal.DrAmount: Debit amount for the ledger line. Should be greater than 0 only if DRCR = 1.
SaveJournal.CrAmount: Credit amount for the ledger line. Should be greater than 0 only if DRCR = 2.
SaveJournal.File1: Supporting document (e.g., bill, receipt, expense proof). Stored for audit and compliance purposes.

SaveReceipt.VoucherName: Type of voucher. Here it is “Receipt”, used to identify transaction type.
SaveReceipt.CostClassName: Cost classification (e.g., Primary). Used for cost allocation and reporting.
SaveReceipt.AutoVoucherNo: System-generated voucher number for internal tracking.
SaveReceipt.CurRate: Currency exchange rate. Default = 1 for base currency.
SaveReceipt.Narration: Line-level narration for the specific ledger entry.
SaveReceipt.VoucherDate: Transaction date affecting accounting and reporting period.
SaveReceipt.EntryDate: Date when the entry is recorded in the system.
SaveReceipt.LedgerName: Name of the ledger (e.g., Cash, Bank, Customer).
SaveReceipt.LFNO: Ledger Folio Number (optional reference for accounting tracking).
SaveReceipt.CostCenterName: Name of the cost center (e.g., department, expense head).
SaveReceipt.CrAmount / DrAmount: Allocated amount for the cost center.
SaveReceipt.ItemDetailsCOll: Used when receipt involves item-level adjustments (rare in receipt).
SaveReceipt.TDSVatDetailColl: Tax-related details (TDS/VAT). Used for statutory compliance.
SaveReceipt.CheckDetails: Cheque/payment instrument details (e.g., cheque no, bank name).
SaveReceipt.BillRefColl: Used to adjust receipt against outstanding invoices (important for AR).
SaveReceipt.File1: Supporting document (receipt scan, payment proof, etc.). Used for audit and compliance.

SaveProductCategories.Name: Name of the product category (e.g., Snacks, Beverages). Used to classify products for reporting and organization.
SaveProductCategories.Alias: Alternate or short name for the category. Useful for internal reference or UI display.
SaveProductCategories.Code: Unique identifier for the product category. Used for system mapping, integrations, and quick lookup.
SaveProductCategories.ParentCategoryId: Reference to the parent product category. Enables hierarchical structure (main category → subcategory).

SaveProductCompany.Name: Official name of the product company or brand manufacturer. Used for identifying the company in product records and reports.
SaveProductCompany.Code: Unique identifier assigned to the product company. Used for system mapping, integrations, and quick lookup.
SaveProductCompany.Address: Physical or registered address of the company. Used for communication and documentation purposes.
SaveProductCompany.ContactPerson: Name of the primary contact person representing the company.
SaveProductCompany.PhoneNo: Contact number of the company or contact person. Used for communication and coordination.
SaveProductCompany.Email: Email address of the company or contact person. Used for official communication.
SaveProductCompany.Website: Official website URL of the company. Used for reference and external access to company information.

SaveProductGroup.Name: Name of the product group used to classify products at a higher level (e.g., FMCG, Electronics).
SaveProductGroup.Alias: Alternate or short name for the product group, used for internal reference or display purposes.
SaveProductGroup.Code: Unique identifier for the product group, used for system mapping and quick lookup.
SaveProductGroup.ParentGroupId: Reference to the parent product group, enabling hierarchical grouping (main group → sub-group). Represents nested product group structure.

SaveUnit.Name: Full name of the unit (e.g., "Cartoon", "Kilogram", "Liter", "Piece") — shown in invoices, stock reports, and item masters. Should be unique.
SaveUnit.Alias: Short name or symbol (e.g., "Ctn", "Kg", "Ltr", "Nos") — used for quick entry and display next to quantities. Optional.
SaveUnit.NoOfDecimalPlaces: Number of decimal places allowed for quantity (e.g., 0 for pieces, 2–3 for kg/liters). Controls input precision.
SaveUnit.RateNoOfDecimalPlaces: Number of decimal places allowed for rate/price per unit (usually 2–4). Helps with precise pricing of weight/volume items.
SaveUnit.AmountNoOfDecimalPlaces: Number of decimal places for total amount (Qty × Rate). Usually 2 (matches currency like INR).
SaveUnit.TypeOfUnit: Type/category of unit: • 1 = Quantity (default) – pieces, boxes, dozens • 2 = Weight – kg, gram, ton • 3 = Volume – liter, ml, cubic meter Affects default precision suggestions and reporting.

SaveProduct.Name: Name of the product. Used for identification, billing, and reporting.
SaveProduct.Alias: Alternate or short name for the product. Useful for quick search and display.
SaveProduct.Code: Unique identifier for the product. Used for system mapping and integration.
SaveProduct.BaseUnitId: Base unit of measurement for the product (e.g., PCS, KG). Used for stock and transactions.
SaveProduct.ProductGroupId: Reference to the product group under which the product is categorized.
SaveProduct.GodownId: Identifier of the warehouse/godown where opening stock is maintained.
SaveProduct.Quantity: Opening quantity of the product available in the specified godown.
SaveProduct.UnitId: Unit of measurement for the opening quantity.
SaveProduct.Rate: Selling price of the product used in sales transactions.
SaveProduct.Amount: Total value of opening stock (Quantity × Rate).
SaveProduct.ApplicableFrom: Date from which the selling price becomes effective.
SaveProduct.File1: Product image file used for display in UI, catalog, or reporting.

SaveStockJournalOpening.VoucherDate: Date of the opening stock journal entry. Determines the accounting and inventory period.
SaveStockJournalOpening.ManualVoucherNO: User-defined voucher number. If not provided, system may auto-generate.
SaveStockJournalOpening.VoucherName: Type of voucher. Here it represents stock journal for opening inventory entries.
SaveStockJournalOpening.RefNo: Reference number for the transaction (optional). Used for tracking and external references.
SaveStockJournalOpening.Narration: Description or remarks for the opening stock entry.
SaveStockJournalOpening.ProductName: Name of the product for which opening stock is recorded.
SaveStockJournalOpening.UnitName: Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., PCS, KG).
SaveStockJournalOpening.Rate: Cost rate per unit of the product.
SaveStockJournalOpening.ActualQty: Actual physical quantity of stock available.
SaveStockJournalOpening.BilledQty: Quantity considered for valuation and accounting purposes.
SaveStockJournalOpening.FreeQty: Free quantity (if any) included in stock without cost impact.
SaveStockJournalOpening.DiscountPer: Discount percentage applied on the item value.
SaveStockJournalOpening.DiscountAmt: Discount amount applied on the item value.
SaveStockJournalOpening.Amount: Total value of the stock item (based on quantity and rate after discount).
SaveStockJournalOpening.File1: Supporting document (e.g., opening stock statement or audit file) attached for reference and compliance.

SalesOrder.VoucherName: Type of voucher. Represents Sales Order transaction.
SalesOrder.AutoVoucherNo: System-generated voucher number for internal tracking.
SalesOrder.CurRate: Currency exchange rate applicable to the transaction.
SalesOrder.Narration: General description or remarks for the sales order.
SalesOrder.VoucherDate: Date of the sales order transaction.
SalesOrder.PartyLedgerName: Name of the customer/party placing the order.
SalesOrder.AgentName: Name of the sales agent associated with the order.
SalesOrder.UnitId: Unit of measurement for the product.
SalesOrder.Rate: Rate applied for the additional cost.
SalesOrder.VatRate: VAT rate applied at batch level.
SalesOrder.LedgerName: Name of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., Freight, VAT).
SalesOrder.AccessableValue: Base value on which the charge is calculated.
SalesOrder.CreditDays: Number of credit days allowed for the customer.
SalesOrder.SalesTaxNo: Tax identification number of the customer.
SalesOrder.File1: Supporting document (e.g., order document or agreement) attached to the sales order.

SalesInvoice.VoucherDate: Date of the sales invoice transaction. Determines accounting and reporting period.
SalesInvoice.ManualVoucherNO: User-defined invoice number. If not provided, system may auto-generate.
SalesInvoice.RefNo: Reference number (e.g., order number or external reference).
SalesInvoice.Narration: Description or remarks for the invoice.
SalesInvoice.PartyLedgerId: Identifier of the customer/party ledger associated with the invoice.
SalesInvoice.TotalAmount: Total invoice amount including items, taxes, and additional charges.
SalesInvoice.BranchId: Identifier of the branch where the transaction is recorded.
SalesInvoice.ProductId: Identifier of the product being sold.
SalesInvoice.ItemAllocationId: Unique identifier for the item allocation line (used for update/reference).
SalesInvoice.Rate: Rate applied for the charge (e.g., VAT %).
SalesInvoice.Amount: Total amount of the additional charge or tax.
SalesInvoice.UnitId: Unit of measurement for the product.
SalesInvoice.DiscountPer: Discount percentage applied to the product.
SalesInvoice.DiscountAmt: Discount amount applied to the product.
SalesInvoice.LedgerId: Identifier of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., VAT, Discount, Freight).
SalesInvoice.Naration: Description of the additional charge (e.g., VAT, Discount).
SalesInvoice.File1: Supporting document (e.g., tax invoice PDF) attached for reference and compliance.

SalesReturn.VoucherName: Type of voucher representing a sales return transaction.
SalesReturn.RefNo: Reference number linked to the original sales invoice or transaction.
SalesReturn.CurrencyName: Currency in which the transaction is recorded.
SalesReturn.CurRate: Exchange rate applicable to the currency.
SalesReturn.Narration: Remarks or description for the sales return.
SalesReturn.VoucherDate: Date of the sales return transaction.
SalesReturn.PartyLedgerName: Name of the customer/party returning the goods.
SalesReturn.TotalAmt: Total value of the sales return including items and additional charges.
SalesReturn.ProductName: Name of the product being returned.
SalesReturn.ActualQty: Actual quantity of the returned product.
SalesReturn.UnitName: Unit of measurement for the product.
SalesReturn.Rate: Rate applied for the charge or tax.
SalesReturn.Amount: Total amount of the charge or tax.
SalesReturn.LedgerName: Name of the ledger for additional charges (e.g., VAT, Excise Duty).
SalesReturn.CreditDays: Number of credit days applicable for the return transaction.
SalesReturn.Buyes: Name of the buyer/customer associated with the return.
SalesReturn.SalesTaxNo: Tax identification number of the customer.
SalesReturn.TermsOfDelivery: Delivery terms associated with the transaction.
SalesReturn.Destination: Destination location for the returned goods.
SalesReturn.TermsOfPayment: Payment terms related to the transaction.
SalesReturn.OtherRefereces: Additional references or remarks related to the return.
SalesReturn.File1: Supporting document (e.g., sales return invoice or proof) attached for reference and compliance.

Consumption.VoucherName: Type of voucher representing a consumption entry.
Consumption.VoucherId: Unique identifier of the consumption voucher. Used for update/reference.
Consumption.Narration: Description or remarks for the consumption transaction.
Consumption.PartyLedgerName: Name of the related party ledger (if applicable).
Consumption.PartyLedgerId: Identifier of the related party ledger (if applicable).
Consumption.ProductId: Identifier of the product being consumed.
Consumption.CostCenterId: Identifier of the cost center where the consumption is allocated.
Consumption.UnitId: Unit of measurement for the product.
Consumption.Rate: Cost rate per unit of the product.
Consumption.Amount: Total cost of consumed quantity (Quantity × Rate).
Consumption.File1: Supporting document (e.g., consumption report or internal record) attached for reference.

PurchaseInvoice.VoucherDate: Date of the purchase invoice transaction.
PurchaseInvoice.VoucherName: Name/type of the voucher representing purchase invoice.
PurchaseInvoice.RefNo: Reference number for the purchase invoice (e.g., supplier invoice number).
PurchaseInvoice.TotalAmount: Total amount of the purchase invoice including items and charges.
PurchaseInvoice.Narration: Description or remarks for the purchase transaction.
PurchaseInvoice.PartyLedgerName: Name of the supplier/vendor associated with the purchase.
PurchaseInvoice.Buyes: Name or category of the supplier.
PurchaseInvoice.SalesTaxNo: Tax identification number of the supplier.
PurchaseInvoice.CreditDays: Number of credit days allowed by the supplier.
PurchaseInvoice.DueDate: Due date for payment of the invoice.
PurchaseInvoice.TermsOfDelivery: Delivery terms associated with the purchase.
PurchaseInvoice.TermsOfPayment: Payment terms agreed with the supplier.
PurchaseInvoice.AdvancePayment: Amount paid in advance for the purchase.
PurchaseInvoice.Notes: Additional notes or remarks related to the purchase.
PurchaseInvoice.GodownName: Name of the warehouse/godown where items are stored.
PurchaseInvoice.UnitName: Unit of measurement for the product.
PurchaseInvoice.Amount: Total amount for the item (Quantity × Rate after discount).
PurchaseInvoice.File1: Supporting document (e.g., purchase bill or invoice) attached for reference and record keeping.

SaveMonthlyProjection.LedgerId: Identifier of the ledger (e.g., customer, distributor, or branch) for which projection is defined.
SaveMonthlyProjection.YearId: Fiscal year identifier for the projection (e.g., Nepali fiscal year).
SaveMonthlyProjection.MonthId: Month identifier within the fiscal year (e.g., 1–12).
SaveMonthlyProjection.ProductId: Identifier of the product for which projection quantity is defined.
SaveMonthlyProjection.ProjectionQty: Projected quantity of the product for the specified ledger, year, and month.

SaveNoOrder.VoucherDate: Date of the salesman visit to the outlet.
SaveNoOrder.LedgerId: Identifier of the outlet/customer ledger visited by the salesman.
SaveNoOrder.Remarks: Remarks or reason for no order during the visit.
SaveNoOrder.VisitStatus: Status of the visit (e.g., completed, not available, no order placed).
SaveNoOrder.Lat: Latitude coordinate of the visit location.
SaveNoOrder.Lng: Longitude coordinate of the visit location.
SaveNoOrder.NerestLocation: Nearest known location or landmark of the visit.
SaveNoOrder.NextScheduleDateTime: Next scheduled visit date and time for the outlet.
SaveNoOrder.File1: Image or proof of visit (e.g., outlet photo) attached for tracking and verification.

Exp_Claim.DateFrom: Start date of the expense claim period.
Exp_Claim.DateTo: End date of the expense claim period.
Exp_Claim.ExpenseTitle: Title or summary of the expense claim.
Exp_Claim.ExpenseTypeId: Identifier representing the type of expense (e.g., travel, food, lodging).
Exp_Claim.PurposeOfVisit: Purpose of the visit or activity for which the expense is claimed.
Exp_Claim.ExpenseDate: Date on which the expense was incurred.
Exp_Claim.Quantity: Quantity related to the expense (e.g., number of items, trips).
Exp_Claim.Rate: Cost per unit of the expense.
Exp_Claim.Description: Description or remarks for the specific expense item.
Exp_Claim.File1: Supporting document (e.g., expense bill or receipt image) attached for verification and record.
